changes.summary: Maximum number of configurable ring blocks increased from 5 to 6.
When bullseye_rings is set, at least 2 ring blocks are required.
Apply no longer automatically adds a default sixth ring with a 2-second expansion timeout; only configured rings are sent to the API.
Read now includes the last API ring in state instead of omitting it, preserving member_groups on the final ring.
Export now includes the last API ring instead of omitting it, preserving member_groups on the final ring.
